_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
reference_document_element_description: Build and maintain automated data pipelines with version-controlled transformations, automated testing, environment parity between development and production, and deployment processes that enable rapid iteration without production risk.
comments: DCWF task superset of WIDAI DA domain. DA-T-011 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DA-T-005 (DA, cosine: 0.558), OP-T-007 (OP, cosine: 0.546).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 6.7/10 (raw 0.665). Shared vocabulary: [automated, build, data]. DCWF-only terms [conduits, management] vs WIDAI-only terms [controlled, deployment, development, enable, environment, iteration] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.877 (P=0.908, R=0.847). P exceeds R by 0.061 — the DCWF element's 5 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 27 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (99.8%). "Build automated data management conduits." and "Build and maintain automated data pipelines with version-controlled transformati" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.565 < STS 0.665 (gap -0.100). Cross-attention finds deeper alignment than independent encoding. The relationship depends on cross-text reasoning — concept-level mapping between [conduits, management] and [controlled, deployment, development] that bi-encoders structurally cannot capture.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 11.5%. Shared tokens: [automated, build, data]. DCWF-only: [conduits, management]. WIDAI-only: [controlled, deployment, development, enable, environment, iteration].
